description: The SequenceBlock class can be used to access the parGroups of a specific block (set of parGroups) in a sequence. Note: use the parameter name without the sequence prefix.

members.name: index
members.description: The numeric index of the block.

members.name: owner
members.description: The OP to which this object belongs.

members.name: par
members.description: An intermediate parameter collection object, from which a specific sequence parameter can be found. Names do not include sequence info prefix.

members.name: parGroup
members.description: An intermediate parameter collection object, from which a specific sequence parameter group can be found. Names do not include sequence info prefix.

members.name: name
members.description: Get or set the sequence block name parameter value. This is implemented as a specifically named parameter in each block. The name is also used to identify a block by string via Sequence[].

members.name: namePar
members.description: The parameter defining the name for this block, or None if there isn't one.

members.name: sequence
members.description: The sequence object this block belongs to.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the SequenceBlock Class wiki page
